iv 
 
ISHIWI LYANTANSHI 
 
Ukutendeka kwakupilibula nokubomfya ubutantiko bupya ubwa masambililo ayalekomaila 
pamusambi ukwishiba ifyakubomba imilimo (Competence-Based Curriculum) kubeleleko 
ukukansha abasambi pakuti beshibishe imilimo iilefwaikwa munkulo iyandakai. 
 Ubusalo bwa aya masamililo ayapya ayakwishibisha ifyakubomba imilimo yali munshila nangula 
mulutampulo lwakupilibula nokupakamisha amasambililo ukulosha ku milimo abasambi bafwile 
ukwishiba.  
Iciputulwa ca masambililo cili icayangwa kumafya ayengatumbukamo ilyo lyonse kwaba 
ukupilibula imipekanishishe yamasambililo. Kanshi cili icaipelesha ukupekanya ifisolobelo 
ifyakubomfya pakufunda nokusambilila mukutungilila imifundile yabasambi mucaalo conse. 
Ici icitabo cakubomfya pakufunda Icibemba capangwa ukukonka na imipekanishishe ya basambi 
iipya iyakukonkomesha nganshi pakubakansha mukwishibisha ifyakubomba imilimo ukupitila 
mukushininkisha ukuti amasambililo yabasambi nayalolenkana nemilimo iilekabilwa ukubombwa 
mucaalo.  Iyi mipekanishishe yamasambililo ya 2023 Zambia Curiculum Framewrk ilekomaila 
pafyo abasambi balingile ukwishiba ifili pamo nga ukubombela pamo, ukutontonkanya 
mukushika, ukucenjela mufyakupanga-panga na amaano yacifyalilwa, inshila shakupwishamo 
amafya, ukwishiba nokutontonkanya ifyakusobolola imilandu, ukuibaka mu maano, ukwishiba 
ukubomfya kompyuta mukulemba nokubelenga elyo nokwishiba ifyakucita amakwebo 
yakuisungilamo.  
 Imitwe yamasambililo, imitwe inoono, nokutendeka ukubomfya iyi nshila yamasabililo ikabila 
ukukomaila pakwishiba ifyakubomba imilimo iyalekana-lekana elyo nokuipelesha pamaka 
mumibombele.   
Kanshi ndi nesubilo ilyakuti iyi mipekanishishe yamasamambililo ili nokwafwilisha apakalamba 
ukupitila mukubimbamo abasambi bonse muno caalo ca Zambia. 
 
Ici citabo cilelanga ukuipelesha ukwaba pa ciputulwa ca masambililo pakuti ubu bupilibulo bwa 
masambililo bube ubwayanguka kuli bakafundisha, ukupitila mukubalangilila bwini-bwino 
ifyakufunda, ukulondolola mukwanguka imilimo nangula ifyakucita elyo nenshila shakweseshamo 
abasambi ishalekana-lekana mu mipekanishishe ipya iya masambililo. Leelo nangula cingaba ifi, 
bakafundisha bali abasuminishiwa nokucincishiwa ukulundamo imilimo iyo bengamona 
iyakwafwa abasambi ukulingana nefyo bengafwailisha ukupitila mufyo baasambilila, mukucincila, 
nokusalapuka kwabo pakuti bakwanisha ukubikamo imilimo imo-imo iishili muli ici citabo leelo 
ilemoneka ukukabilwa panshita balefunda abasambi mu ncende shabo. 
 
Ici citabo cakubomfya pakufunda Icibemba capekanishiwa mukupeela bakafundisha ifisolobelo 
nokubalangilila inshila shakufundilamo icibemba kubasambi abali mu Fomu 1.

v 
 
Amasambililo yamu Fomu 1 mu Cibemba yapekanishiwa ukupitila mukubebeta, ukupitulukamo 
ukwa mipekanishishe ya masambililo yamu 2023 ukwacitilwe neciputulwa ca masambililo.  Uyu 
mulimo wakupitulukamo waletelwe pamilandu iyingi nencenshi ishingi isho ishakabiile nganshi 
ukupilibula amasambililo ukufuma mufyo abasambi baleishiba: Outcome-Based Curriculum 
(OBC) ukuya kunshila iipya iyakukansha abasambi ukwishiba ifyakubomba imilimo: 
Competence-Based Curriculum (CBC). 
 
 
 
Uku kupituluka mu masambililo nakabili kwabeleleko pamulandu wakufwaya inshila yakukana 
peelafye abaana amano yakwishibafye ifuntu epela leelo ukubapeela na ubwishibilo pafyo 
bacindikakisha, ukukwata imbela iyisuma nokwishiba ifyakubomba imilimo iyo bengalabomba 
namubuumi bwabo ilyo bapwisha amasukulu yabo nangula ilyo bapwisha amasambilil yabo. 
 
 
Kelvin Mambwe (Dr.) 
Permanent Secretary – Educational Services 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

vi 
 
UKUTASHA 
Ici citabo cakubomfya pakukafunda Icibemba mu Fomu 1 catumbuka mukubimbamo 
nokubombesha apakalamba ukwa bantu abengi aba muciputulwa ca masambililo elyo nabambi 
abashaba muli ici ciputulwa. Kwali ukufwailisha nikwipushanya apakalamba kutubungwe twamu 
caalo utwalekana-lekana na kubantu abalekana-lekana pakwishiba itontonkanyo lyabo palubali lwa 
ubu bupilibulo bwa masambililo ukulolekesha pamasambililo yakale elyo nemipekanishishe ya 
ndakai. 
Iciputulwa ca masambililo ciletasha apakalamba bonse abasendelemo ulubali muli uyu mulimo 
pamilangwe yabo iyo babiikilemo mukupanga ici citabo ca mifundile ya Cibemba ku basambi 
abali mu Fomu 1. 
Namukulekelesha ndepeela ukutasha nganshi kubabomfi bonse abaku ciputulwa ca Curriculum 
Development Centre pakuipelesha kwabo konse mukulemba ici citabo elyo nopekanya 
nokupwishishisha ubutantiko bupya ubwa aya masambililo. 
 
 
Charles K. Ndakala (Dr.) 
Director Curriculum Development 
MINISTRY OF EDUCATION

ix 
 
 
INTENDEKELO 
 
 
Ici citabo icakubomfya pakufunda Icibemba mu Fomu 1 capangiilwe ukwafwilisha ukupekanya 
nokufunda amasambililo ukukonka nemipekanishe ipya iya masambililo iyamu 2024 
iyasuminishiwa neciputulwa ca masambililo.  Nakuba ici citabo cili pakwimininako ifitabo 
ifyalekana-lekana ifyakubomfya pakufunda ifyo ifishilalembwa pali kano kashita elyo 
nokwafwilisha bakafundisha mukubalangilila imilimo iyo abasambi balingile ukucita elyo na 
ifyakwesha abasambi ukulingana nefyo balekabila pamushinku bafikilepo. 
 
Iciputulwa ca masambililo cili icaibukila nokwishiba amafya yamo-yamo ayaletumbuka muli uku 
kupilibula kwa masambililo mukutwala abasambi mukwishiba imilimo imo-imo iyo bafwile 
ukwishiba ukubomba. Ukulemba kwa ici citabo kulelangisha ukuipelesha kwa ciputulwa ca 
masambililo mukumona ukuti ubu bulendo bwakupilibula amasambililo bwaba ubwayanguka kuli 
bakafundisha ukupitila mukubalangilila ifyakufunda absambi imilimo, ifyakwesha abasambi 
ukukonka ifilekabilwa muli ubu butantiko. Leelo nangula cingaba ifi, bakafundisha bali 
abacincishiwa ukulundapo imilimo imo-imo iyakufunda abasambi iishili muli ici citabo ukupitila 
mukufwailisha kwabo nokusalapuka kwabo pakutila bakwanisha ifilekabilwa kubasambi ilyo 
balefunda aya masambililo. 
 
Kuli isubilo ilikamba ilyakuti ici citabo cili nokwafwilisha bakafundisha ilyo balefunda abasambi 
muli ubu butantiko bupya ubwa Competence-Based Curriculum, ubulepakamisha ubuumi bwa 
basamni mukubapeela amasambililo ayalingana nemilimo iilekabilwa ukubombwa mubwikashi 
bwabo.

x 
 
 
IFYO ICI ICITABO CIFWILE UKUBOMFIWA  
Muli ici citabo muli amasambillo mu Cibemba ayafwile ukufundwa mu temu 3. Aya masambililo 
yalyakanishiwa mufipande elyo cila cipande cili nefya kusambilila ifyaakanishiwa mutwe pamo 
nemitwe inoono. Ii mitwe inoono nayo yalyakanishiwa mufipande pamo nga ukumfwa na 
ukulanda, ukubelenga, ukulemba, ukusobolola Icibemba elyo na ukwalula ululimi. Ifyakusambilila 
ifyabiikwa muli ici citabo tafyapekanishiwa nga amasambililo yakufunda, leelo kuti fyabomfiwa 
mukupekanya amasambillo yakufunda cila bushiku ukupitila mukubuulamo ifyakufunda ukufuma 
muli cila cipande pakupanga isambililo limo.  Ilyo mulepekanya amasambililo yakufunda, 
mufwile ukulabula ifikomo ifyakufunda ukufuma mu fipande fyonse ifilumbwilwe pakupanga 
isambililo limo.  Icilangililo, isambililofye limo kuti lyakwata ifikomo ifingi ifyakufunda muli ifi 
fipande: ukumfwa na ukulanda, ukubelenga, ukulemba, ukusobolola Icibemba elyo na ukwalula 
ululimi. Kanshi ilyo mulepekanya isambililo, mufwile ukusala ifikomo fyakufunda ifyo 
mulefwaya ukulolekeshapo pamo na imilimo nangula ifyakucita ifyo abasambi bafwile ukubomba 
pali cila cipande cafilekabilwa ukwishiba.  Eico kanshi isambililo limo kuti lyakwata ifilekabilwa 
ukwishiba ifingi ukucila pali cimofye. 
Nomba mulingile ukusala icipande icilingile ukupeeleshapo inshita iikalamba mwebene.  Nakabili 
ifyakucita ifyapekanishiwa pali cila ifilekabilwa ukwishiba tefyakupwisha mwisambililo limofye 
iyo.  Ifi ifyakucita kuti fyabombwa mu masambililo ayalekana – lekana ukulingana nefyo 
mupekenye.

xi 
 
 
INSHILA YAMIFUNDILE IYABIIKWAMO 
Lyonse ilyo mulefunda, mulingile ukubomfya nokukonka inshila shakufundilamo abasambi 
ishalekana-lekana. Kanshi kuti mwabomfya inshila shimo pali ishi:  
 Ukupanga utusela (Role-play) 
 Ukubomba imilimo yalekana-lekana ukupitila mukwangala utusela (play activities/ drama) 
 Ukufwailisha ifishinka pamilandu iyalekana-lekana (Research) 
 Ukusambilila ukupitila mukulanshanya (discussions) 
 Ukusambilila ukupitila mukufwaya nokusanga ifishinka pamilandu iyalekana-lekana 
(discovery) 
 Ukulemba utumalyashi utwiipi (short stories 
 Ukubomfya kompyuta mukupanga amalyashi, utusela nama poyemu 
Ukulundapo, kuli notumisango utunsela-nsela natumbi utwamifundile uto kafundisha alingile 
ukubomfwa pakuti akwanishe ukufunda abasambi abalekana-lekana abasangwa mu kalasi intu 
afundamo. Bakafundisha baalishiba utu tunsela-nsela utwingi ukulingana nefyo baakanshiwa 
mumasambililo yabo kuma college.

1 
 
 
ICIPANDE 1: IFISUMINO NA INTAMBI SHACAALO 
Ubulondoloshi:  
Muli ici cipande muli ukulanshanya pa Ifisumino na Intambi shacaalo. Ubukankala 
bwailisambililo bwakumona ukuti abasambi babomfya amashiwi ukulingana na ilyashi 
balelandapo. Kabili abasambi bakasambilila ifyakwasuka ameepusho panuma yakubelenga elyo na 
ukulanshanya pamashiwi yantu basanga ayakosa ubupilibulo. Abasambi bakalabelenga 
mukwikatisha ukwishiba ngacakuti balebelenga busaka -busaka. Nakabili abasambi bakasambilila 
ifyakuleemba ilyashi ukubomfya ifikomo fifwaikwa pakupanga ilyashi. Mukusoobolola Icibemba, 
abasambi bakasambilila panundwa elyo na ukusambilila ifyo beengalula ululimi lumo ukutwala 
mululimi lumbi. 
A: UKUMFWA NA UKULANDA 
Umutwe: Ukulanshanya 
Umutwe Unoono: Ukushimika Ilyashi 
Ifilekabilwa Ukwishiba: Ukubomfya amashiwi ayayaana pakushimika ilyashi illipeelwe 
pamulandu ‘Ukukobekela Namasambililo’ 
Ifyakubomfya: abasambi, ifitabo fimbi 
Amashiwi Ayakankala:  mumpuka, fipoka-poka, ukukobekela, 
yakubuko,amakunda,asaminefye, yaleemusabukila 
 
Ifikomo fyakufundapo:   
a. Ukubomfya amashiwi ayayana na umulandu upeelwe 
b. Ukulondolola ifyo ifisumino na intambi shacaalo shingabacingilila mumicitile 
c. Amafya yasangwamo muli iyi micitile 
d. Ukupeela ifilangililo fyabanabo abasangwa muli iyi micitile 
e. Ukubomfya Icibemba icasuminishiwa 
Ifyakucita 1: Ukulanshanya palyashi pakati kakokwa Mulenga nabanankwe

 Biika abasambi mumabumba 
 Eba abasambi babelenge umulandu uuli pali Mulenga nabanankwe 
 Balanshanye umulandu uuli pali Mulenga nabanankwe

2 
 
Umulandu 
Umutwe; ‘Ukukobekela Namasambililo’ 
Mulenga mumpuka yakwe mwali abalumendo MicroSoft Zulu na Bupe abaali pa Mulila 
Nsolo Sekondale. Aba balumendo lyonse baali fipokapoka fyeka- fyeka, kabili 
baleesambililafye ikaalasi limo line mu Geledi 11 na ukulaala ing’anda imo. Konse uko 
baaleeya nakonse uko baaleeba, akasuba konse na icungulo lyonse ilyashi batemenwe 
ukulandapo lyapa kukobekela. Mulenga wena aishile mu Geledi 10 ninshi aalikobekela 
kale aalinaka nakukubomba imilimo yakubuko.  MicroSoft Zulu neeco aleefwaisha 
ukukobekela aleefwaisha saana ukumfwa kulyashi. Kuti pakwikala naleema namakunda 
asaminefye Mulenga uko aleelanda icakuti namate yaleemusabukila nakumpumi. Lelo 
Bupe wena taleesuminisha kuli uyu mulandu wakukobekela ilyo bacilli kusukulu kabili 
abaice.

Umulandu 
Ifisumino na intambi shacaalo(‘National Values’) fiintu ifyo twasuminamo na intambi shesu 
ngecaalo ukuti efyakulatutungulula mumicitile na mumikalile yesu. Ifi fisumino na intambi   
fyaba nga kampashi iitungulula umuntu intunga alefwaya ukulolako. Kabili ifi fine fisumino 
pamofye na intambi filaafwa ubuteeko ukupanga ubupingushi ubwakusekesha umwikala- caalo 
onse. Filatungilila na ukucingilila insambu sha muntunse ishili nga amasambililo, amapepo, 
amaisosele na ukusala intungulushi sha buteeko ukwabula ukucilinganishiwa. Ukulundapo, ifi 
fisumino filatungilila, ukucindikishanya nga bekala-caalo, ukucindika na ukusunga ifipe na 
ifishibilo fyacaalo ifyo ifilanga ubukankala na ubunonshi bwacaalo. Napali ifi, paaba imendela 
yacaalo, ulwimbo lwa cishipa, ‘One Zambia One Nation’ elyo nafimbipo. 
Inshita ishingi ubuteeko, ifilonganino na utubungwe tushili twabuteeko ukubikapofye na machalici 
balakomaila lyonse pamicitiile na imisango iibi iyo ifisumino na intambi shacaalo ceesu 
tafisuminisha. Napali iyi micitile na imisango ibi pali imibomfeshe ya miti ikola, ifyupo fya 
mubwaice, amafumo yamubwaice ayabula ukwenekela elyo na mafya yambi ayo abekala-caalo 
bashingwana nayo. Mu lyashi twabelengele mwisambililo UKumfwa na Ukulanda ilyali 
pamutwe’Ukukobekela Namasambililo’, mubongo bwabalumendo mwaiswilefye amaano 
yapakuupa ilyo bacili abaice kabili pasukulu. Ababemba tababeepa pakulanda abati, ’uwaikete 
fibili afwile kumeenshi’. Bushe aba abalumendo kuti bakwanisha muli ayama tontonkanyo 
bakwete? 
Icipendo cabaume nabanakashi abalesangwa mumicitile yakukangana pakati kabo cileilakofye 
pamulu. Muli uku ukukungana mulaba ukucenana, ukwambula amalwele ya lwambu ilyo kwaba 
ukupatikishiwa ukulungana, amafumo elyo na imfwa. Iyi temicitile iyasuminishiwa ukulingana

Ubusuma Bwamasambililo 
Ilyo amasukulu yabasungu tayalaisa muli cino icaalo cesu kwali amasukulu yacikaya. Abaume 
bakwete insaka umo balefundilwa ifintu ifyalekana lekana. Pansaka baalesambililapo umucinshi, 
incito ishili nga ukulima, ukubasa, ukuluka amatanda, ukufula amasembe, ukulunga elyo 
nashimbipo. 
Banamaayo nabo baaleteeka ifibwanse epo balesambilisha abakashaana amafunde yamikalile nga; 
ukwipika, ukusala na ukubyala imbuto elyo na imilimo yabanamaayo iyalekana-lekana. Namaayo 
aashalesangwa pacibwanse aaleba cipelelo. Nangu cibe ifyo ukusambilila ukwaishibikwa saana 
munshita yanoomba kwamasukulu.    Muli aya amasukulu namo, mwaba amasambililo ayalekana 
lekana . Mwaba ukusambilila ukulemba, ukubelenga, ifipendo, ifyakupanga-panga, ubulimi 
nafimbi ifingesa afwilisha umusambi mubwikalo bwakwe kuntashi. Muli ili ilyashi tekuti

23 
 
tulumbule ubusuma bonse ubwaba mukusambilila ala batila ukupenda intanda kwandwa (twamuli 
samfwe tatupwa kusala) . Pantu cili icacine nangu ni mu masukulu yacikaya, insaka nangu 
ifibwanse, nelyo ayaleelo, ubusuma bwena bwingi. Umuntu nga  asambilila alatumpuluka pantu 
aleshiba ifintu ifingi ifimushingulwike. Ukusambilila kulalenga ailuka bwangu ifintu ifyo limbi 
finga peela uushasambilila ubwafya. Ilyo umo asambilila incito iyo alefwaya, alayafwilisha 
umwine palwakwe. Teico ceeka, alafwaako na abantu bambi abo alebombela incite. Tutila ngani 
kafundisha usambilila cila bushiku nokuyafwilisha, alaaleta ubuyantanshi na ukutumpuluka apo 
apashintilila icaalo icili conse. Umuntu onse uo twingalumbula uwasambilila na uubomba incito 
ishalekana lekana aatalile apita musukulu. 
Abantu abengi nga basambilila icaalo cilaya pamulu mufintu ifingi. Ici mulandu wakuti 
bakanyekanye wancito ishalekana-lekana balafula. Ne milimo ileenda bwino mucaalo, 
ifyakupanga-panga filafula. Ilyo ifi fyashitishiwa ku fyalo fimbi filaleta ubukumu na ubunonshi 
mu caalo Ici kuti calenga imikalile ya bantu ukuya pamulu na bantu basekelamo ngafintu caba ku 
fyalo fimbi. Ala nico batila ukupenda intanda kwandwa. Ico tatufwile ukulaba bonse 
kuibikilishapo saana na ukuitwala pantanshi mu masambililo yesu pantu tukasekelamo kuntanshi.

Tontonkanyeeni nga cakuti muno Zambia twikala bonse nga baleelanda ululimi lumo lwine 
ngacali shani? Mwe beene mwayasukila. Leelo, ndefwaya ukulandako ifyo ukukwata indimi 
ishingi kwawamina na ifyo twinga cindika abalanda indimi isho tushilandako. 
Ngacakuti indimi nashifula mucaalo cilangilila ukuti abantu abafumine kuncende shapusana 
pusana baalisa pamo mukwikala muli iyo ncende. Kabili tukasanga mwaliba na cila mutundu 
ulakwata ifishilano fyabo ukulosha kufyo balya ifyo bafwala elyo na ifyo beekala. Kanshi na 
imimwene yafintu pamo nga imyupile, ifyakukusha abaana, ifya kusunga ulupwa nafimbipo. 
Ilyo twalanda pa filyo tukamona ukuti imo imitundu tailya ifyo imitundu imbi ilya. 
Kucakumwenako, imitundu imo pamo nga iilanda Icibemba ilalalya saana ifishimu ilyo imitundu 
imbi tailya nakalya. Icakuti nga baamona umunabo aleelya kufwaya na ukoolomoka pantu aumfwa 
umuselu. Imbi imitundu ilalya ifishishi pamo nga bafulufute ifyo imbi tailya. Imitundu imo 
iyapalamina kumimana umunani balya saana lisabi. Imbi nayo iikala kumulundu yalikwata 
iminani balya. Ubunga nabo bamo bapela kumataba elyo bambi nabo bafumya kuli kalundwe, 
amasaka elyo namale. 
Ilyo caisa kukuupa nako cila mutundu waba na intambi bakonka. Imitundu imo impango 
shilipilwa ukubomfya ing’ombe. Imitundu ilanda Icitonga, Icingoni, Icinamwanga na Icitumbuka 
eko uyu umwata waseeka. Imitundu imo, banyina kwa mukashana balapekanya ifilyo fya 
kutwalila umuko pakuti abeuwakakulwa pakulya mwa banafyala. Imitundu ilanda Icibemba na 
Bansenga eba kwata ulu lutambi. Ilyo caisa kulupwa, imitundu imo yacindika saana abeena-wishi 
shimbi nasho abeena-nyina. Ilyo caisa na mukupyana pabufumu imo imitundu baana bapyana elyo 
imbi nayo beepwa. 
Ifi twatantawila fyonse pamuulu fileelanga ukuti cila mutundu waba na umusango ucitilamo ifintu.

Ukuilama kulalenga uleebomfya bwino inshita. Tawakalelolela ukucita ifintu lilya inshita yapwa 
nelyo kwashala mineti umo. Nakabili ukeesha ukucimfya amafya yaleefwaya ukucilinganya 
amapange yobe yasuma. Cimbi naco ulingile ukukwata mibeele iilekwafwa ukuba uwatunguluka 
mufyo uleefwaya ukucita. Teekubomfya ubufumfuntungu. 
Calicindama ukuipusha we mwine ifyo wingaitwala pantanshi, ‘Nintampulonshi ninga bomfya 
pakuti ningaitwala pantanshi?  Ishakonkapo inshila kuti shakwafwako:  
1. Imika 
ubuyo 
ubowingakwanisha, 
ubwingakwafwako 
ukuwamyako 
amatoni 
mumasambililo. Kutendekela kukucita ifintu ifinoono-finoono. 
2. Tantika inshita yakucita ifintu pamonga ukubelenga panshita imo ine cilabushiku (kuti 
caba kumatundaca nelyo icunglo-bushiku), ukutukushako umubili elyo na ukubomfya 
inshita bwino. 
3. Sambilila ukukana kufintu ifilekucilinganya ukufishapo ubuyo boobe ubwakuitwala 
pantanshi. Ici casanshamo imibeele iyonaula umubili obe, na ifili fyonse ifingalenga 
walayumfwa kwati teeti ukwanishe. Bumusumina-yote tabwafwa nakalya. Bukaleetafye 
amafya kuli iwe. 
4. Wemwine ufwile ukuiconga pafyo lebomba tekukwata ubunang’ani. Ebako bamo ifili 
amapange yobe, kuti baaba bafyashi nelyo bakafundisha abenga kukosekelesha 
ukushipikisha pakutifye ufishepo ifyo ufwaya ukucita. 
5. Amafya tayapwa, kanshi ufwile ukukosa. Ufwile ukumona amafya ngeshuko lyakubelako 
uwashipa. Tekunaka iyo. Winenuka, nakalya!

ifyo iminwe yakwe yaleetutuma na ifyo umutima waleetuntisha

A giraffe is a tall animal with a long neck and legs. It has a spotted skin that helps it blend in with 
trees and bushes. Giraffes live in Africa and like to eat leaves from tall trees. Their favourite food 
is acacia leaves, which they grab with their long tongues. Giraffes are peaceful and do not fight 
much. They can run fast, even though they look slow because of their long legs. The young 
giraffes, called calves, are already pretty tall when they are born. They are about as big as a grown-
up person. One of the most incredible things about giraffes is that they have huge hearts to pump 
blood up to their heads. Their necks might be extended, but they still have the same number of 
neck bones as people, just bigger ones. 
ILIPUSHO 2: Pilibwila uyu mulandu uli peesamba mu Cisungu, ukubomfya inshila 
shimo-shimo isho wasambilila. 
Ilyo twalanda pa filyo, tukamona ukuti imo imitundu tailya ifyo imitundu imbi ilya. 
Kucakumwenako, imitundu shimo pamo nga ishilanda Icibemba shilalalya saana ifishimu ilyo 
imitundu imbi tailya nakalya. Icakuti nga baamona umunabo aleelya kufwaya na ukoolomoka 
pantu aumfwa umuselu. Shimbi imitundu balalya ifishishi pamo nga bafulufute ifyo imbi tailya. 
Imitundu imo apo yapalamina kumimana umunani balya saana lisabi. Imbi nayo iikala kumulundu 
yalikwata iminani balya. Ubunga nabo bamo bapela kumataba elyo bambi nabo bafumya kuli 
kalundwe, amasaka elyo na male. 
Imibombele ileenekelwa: inshila shalekana-lekana shabomfiwa bwino-bwino mukwalula 
imilandu ukufumya mu Cisungu ukutwala mu Cibemba elyo na ukufumya mu Cibemba ukutwala 
mu Cisungu.

Ilyashi

56 
 
Mucaalo camfumu ba Matipa, mwali umukasahana uweshina lya Mwansa uwaleikala na ulupwa 
lwakwe mumushi waleitwa ‘’Kashitu. Nangula baaleikala mu nsansa muli ulu lupwa, imikalile 
yabo yali iyashupako. Bawishi ba kwa Mwansa bali balimi, elyo banyina nabo balebomba incito 
ya kushitisha ifisabo ne fimenwa pamaliketi. Mwansa lyonse balemufunda ukulasunga ubumi 
bwakwe, lelo taishibepo ifingi pa bulwele bwa HIV na AIDS. Bushiku bumo ilyo ba Mwansa 
baleyangala nabanabo, baumfwile abakalamba bamo balelanda pa bulwele bwa HIV na AIDS. 
Batile, ubu bulwele bwalelunduluka bwangu mu caalo, kabili abantu baaleenekelwa ukwikala 
abacenjela pakukana lwala ubu bulwele. 
Mwansa alefwaisha ukwishiba fingi pali ubu bulwele. Eico ubushiku bumo aipwishe banyina pa 
bulwele. Banyina balilondolwele ukuti, akashishi ka HIV kalalenga umubili wamuntu 
ukukaanakwata amaka ya kuicingilila ku malwele, ne ci cilenga umubili ukukwata ubwafya bwa 
kuicingilila ku malwele. Balundilepo na ukuti ubulwele bwa HIV na AIDS kuti bwasalangana nga 
cakuti umuntu alecita ubulalelale ukwabula ukuicingilila, ukubomfya ifyela ifyatwa fimo-fine 
abantu abengi elyo no kufuma kuli banyina ukuya ku mwana ilyo alepaapa. Mwansa asambilile 
ukuti umuntu nga aakwata akashishi ka HIV no kukanabomfya umuti, kuti alwala saana kabili kuti 
afwa no bulwele bwa AIDS, ubu bulwele bwaba pa mpela ya kashishi ka HIV. Banyina 
bamwebele ukuti abantu abakwata akashishi ka HIV kuti baikala imyaka iingi kabili no bumi 
busuma nga balenwa umuti kabili nga baicingilila. 
Panuma Mwansa asambilila fyonse ifi pali HIV, aalilwike ukuti abantu abengi mu mushi aleikala 
nabo balilwele ubu bulwele. Banalume, abaakwete ubuumi ubusuma kale na umubili uwakosa 
baishile nakuka na ukulalwalilila libili-libili. Banyina Mwansa balilondolwele ukuti banalume 
balikwete akashishi ka HIV leelo balenwa umuti pa kuti babe no bumi busuma. Alandile na pa fyo 
abantu bamo mu mushi baaleetiina ukuyapimwa HIV pantu baletontonkanya ukuti, kuti caleta 
insoni ku ndupwa shabo. Mwansa alaile ukukoselesha ifibusa fyakwe na balupwa ukuyapimwa na 
ukwishiba nga bali na HIV pa kuti baicingilile no kucingilila bambi. 
Bushiku bumo, Mwamba, cibusa wa kwa Mwansa, aile kuli ena ninshi ali nobulanda. 
Umukalamba wa kwa Mwamba, umwaume ebushiku aafwile, kabili abantu abengi mu mushi 
batotoshanya ukuti ukuti aafwile ku bulwele bwa AIDS. Mwansa aakoseleshe cibusa wakwe no 
kumwibukisha ukuti abantu abakwata akashishi ka HIV kuti baikala imyaka iingi nga cakuti 
baishiba bwangu ukuti bakwete akashishi ka HIV na ukutendeka ukunwa umuti uukabilwa.

bulwele ukwabula no kupita mumbali, no kwafwa abantu ba mu mushi wakwe ukuba

 Ubukankala Bwa Bulimi Mukupakamisha Ubunonshi Bwa Caalo  
Pamyaka iingi, ubulimi nabo bwalilenga ubunonshi bwacaalo ca Zambia ukuya pantanshi, kabili 
bwalilenga abantu abengi ukupakamisha imikalile yabo. Uyu mulimo ulenga abalimi ukukwata 
indalama ishingi isha kubomfya mukukuula amayanda ayasuma, kabili ulenga abantu baleikala 
bwino mumishi na mumatauni. Abalimi mu Zambia balima ifisabo fyalekanalekana pamo nga 
umwangashi, imbalala, na fwaka. Nangu cingaba ifyo, ubulimi bwamataba ebwacindamisha pantu 
amataba ecakulya caseeka kubena-Zambia abengi, kabili bwalicindama saana pakuti abantu 
balashitisha kufyalo fimbi. Ubuteko bwalisumina ukuti ubulimi ebukalenga ubunonshi bwacaalo 
ukuya pantanshi. 
 
Pamyaka iingi, icaalo ca Zambia cilashingwanana amafya ayalekana-lekana mufyabulimi. Pali ifi, 
paaba nenshita yampepo, icilala na mulamba, ificeefya ubusomboshi. Ukulunda pali ifi, amakuule 
ayashalinga, pamo nga imisebo iyabipa elyo na ukukaanakwaata ifikuulwa fyakusungilamo

59 
 
ifilimwa, filalenga abalimi ukufilwa ukusenda bwino ifilimwa fyabo pakutwaala ku mushiika. Pa 
kupwisha aya amafya, ubuteko na utubungwe utushili twabuteeko, balipanga amapekanyo 
yalekanalekana ayakuwamya imilimo yabulimi mucaalo conse elyo na ukukoselesha abalimi. 
Kucakumwenako, akabungwe ka Farmer Input Support Program (FISP) kalapeela abalimi 
umufundo na imbuto pa kuti balelima bwino. 
Nangu cakuti abalimi banoono balabombesha, abengi bacili baleshupikwa. Napali aya amaafya 
epali, ukukaana kwata ishuko lyakukongola ulupiya ku banki, ukubwabwatala kwa mitengo 
yafilimwa ukubikapofye na ukubulilwa kwa nshila ishisuma ishakuliminamo. Ifi fyonse filenga 
bashibulimi balekaana ukuya pantanshi. Nakucila, bashi-bulimi bakalamba ebo bacindikisha 
ukucila bashi-bulimi banoono. Ici abengi balakangana naco ukutiila tacingaleeta ubunonshi 
bwacaalo kuntanshi. Eico kanshi, ubwafya bukuliishepo saana bwakuti takuli umulingaanya 
mukutungilila bashibulimi banoono na bashi-bulimi bakalaamba mukumona ukuti bonse 
balelundako kubunonshi bwacaalo. 
Mu myaka ya nomba line, icaalo ca Zambia naco catendeke ukubika amano ku kulundulula 
ubulimi ukupitila mukukoselesha abalimi ukutiila bengaitumpa mukulima ifilimwa nafimbi 
ukucila pamataba. Pali ifi, epali; ubulimi bwama fulutushi, intongwe elyo na ubutonge. Ngacakuti 
ici cakonkwa, kuti cayafwilisha abalimi ukukana shintililafye pabulumi bwamataba. Ukukwata 
inshila ishakampuka ishabulimi, ukubikamo icuma icakukampusha ubulimi elyo na ukutungililwa 
ukufuma ku buteeko, kuti kwaba isubilo lyakuti, iciputulwa cabulimi kuti caaya pantanshi na 
ukufusha incito, ukufusha ifyakulya mucaalo ukubikapofye na ukufuntula ubunonshi bwacaalo. 
Kuli isubilo lyakuti umulimo wabulimi kuti watunguluka, nokulenga incito ishingi, ukulenga 
abantu ukukwata ifyakulya, nokwafwilisha mukutwala ubunonshi bwacaalo pantanshi.

ukusalapofye ulubali lumo elo alembapo. 
Ifikomo fyakukonka pakulemba uyu mulandu epali: 
 Ukusalapo ulubali ulelembapo, nga kusuminisha nangu ukukana 
 Ukulemba bwino itontonkanyo lyobe na ukupeela ifishinka pamulandu ulelemba ukucila 
ukulalembafye icilembelembe 
 Ukwishiba ukuti, ulubali lumbi nalo nalukwata ifishinka, leelo ulingile ukukosha 
itontonkanyo lyobe pali uyo mulandu ukupitila mukupeela ifishinka

 Ukubomfya amashiwi ayakusonsomba uulebelenga pakuti asumine kwitontonkanyo lyobe

D. UKUSOBOLOLA ICIBEMBA 
Umutwe 1: Amashiwi Yalanga Ukucitika na Ukucitwa Kwafintu 
Umutwe unoono: Imiseela Ilanga Ukucitika kwafintu na Ukucitwa Kwafintu 
Ifilekabilwa Ukwishiba: ukubomfya amashiwi yalanga ukucitika na ukucitwa kwa fintu 
Amashiwi Ayakankala: Ukucitika na Ukucitwa kwafintu. 
Ifikomo fyakufundapo: Ubulondoloshi pabupilibulo na imibomfeshe yamashiwi yalanga 
ukucitika na ukucitwa kwa fintu (Acitive and Passive Voice) 
Ifyakubomfya:

66 
 
 Caati uulelanga amashiwi yalanga ukucitika na ukucitwa kwafintu 
 Ifitabo ifikwete isambililo pali uyu mutwe. 
Ubulondoloshi: Mululimi lwa Cibemba, kwaliba amashiwi ayalanga ifyo umuntu nangu icintu 
cacita icintu. Aya mashiwi eyo mu Cingeleshi tutila “Active Voice”. Elyo kabili kwaliba na 
amashiwi ayalanga ifyo icintu cicitilwe mu Cingeleshi tutila “Passive voice”. 
Ubusuma bweshiwi lilanga ifyo icintu cilecitika bwakuti, uyu musango wakulandilamo tawashoka 
iyoo kabili ulangusha imilembele yamashiwi ilyo uleelemba ilyashi. Kumfwa amashiwi yalanga 
ifyo icintu cilecitwa (passive) tuyabomfya pakukonkomesha ifyo icintu cicitilwe, kabili ilingiline 
uyu musango wakulembelamo  waseeka mumilembele iyaba ofisho, uyu musango pamuku umo 
wine, tulaubomfya ilyo tatwishibe umuntu uwacicita icintu.  
Ifilangililo: 
Acitive voice: lemba, leeta, fuluka, kalipila, seka, puma 
Passive voice: lembwa, letwa, fulukwa,kalipilwa, sekwa, pumwa 
Mumusango umowine kuti wacinja imiseela ukufuma mu ‘active’ ukutwala mu ‘passive’ na 
ukufumya mu ‘passive’ ukutwala mu ‘active’. Pamo nga ifi: 
 Mutale aletema icimuti (active voice) 
 Icimuti ciletemwa na Mutale (passive voice) 
Ifyakucita 1: Ukulondolola ubupilibulo na umulimo wamashiwi yalanga ukucitika kwacintu 
na ukucitwa kwa cintu. 
i. Kafundisha: 
 Eba abasambi umo umo balelondolola pakanwa ubupilibulo na umulimo ubomba amashiwi 
yalanga ukucitika na ukucitwa kwa cintu 
 Lundapo pabulondoloshi abasambi balepeela pakuti bomfwikishe 
 Eba abasambi beepushe ameepusho apo bashumfwikishe 
ii. Abasambi: 
 Balondolole umo-umo pakanwa ubupilibulo na umulimo wamashiwi yalanga ukucitika na 
ukucitwa kwafintu 
 Baleelemba mufitabo fyabo ubulondoloshi baleumfwa kuli kafundisha 
 Beepushe ameepusho apo tabomfwikishe 
Imibombele ileenekelwa: Ubupilibulo na umulimo wamashiwi yalanga ukucitika na ukucitwa 
kwafintu fyalondololwa bwino

 Eba abasambi basale kalemba pali cilaibumba 
 Eba bakalemba  bacila ibumba ukwisa kuntanshi na ukulondolola ifyo bacilanshanya 
 Lundapo pafyo abasambi balondolola 
ii. Abasambi: 
 Babe mumabumba 
 Balanshanye pabupusano bwaba pamashiwi yalanga ukucitika kwa fintu elyo na ukucitwa 
kwafintu 
 Basale kalemba wakulemba ifyo balelanshanya umabumba yabo. 
 Bakalemba baye kuntanshi na ukulondolola ifyo bacilanshanya 
 Balembe mufitabo fyabo ubulondoloshi bulepelwa ukufuma kuli kafundisha 
Imibombele ileenekelwa: ubupusano pakati ka mashiwi yalanga ifyo icintu cilicitika na amashiwi 
yalangwa ifyo icintu cicitilwe bwapeelwa bwino 
Ifyakucita 3: Ukusanga/ukufwaya amashiwi yalanga ifyo icintu cilecitika elyo na amashiwi 
yalanga ifyo icintu cicitilwe 
Ilyashi 
Ubushiku bwa mailo, abasaambi baaletamba ubunkolanya mucikulwa cakutambilamo. 
Icitunshitunshi cabikilwe kuntanshi yacikulwa elyo abasambi baikele mumipando yabo. 
Pamulandu wakuti balepanga icongo saana panshita baaletamba, kafundisha mukalamba 
asakamikwe apakalamba eico alimine na ukuyafwailisha icalengele icongo. 
Ilyo abasambi bamwene kafundisha mukalamba, bonse baikele tondolo. Abasambi baipushiwe 
ukulondolola icalengele ukuti balekafya icongo camusango ulya, leelo bonse bafililwe

68 
 
ukulondolola eico kafundisha mukalamba acinkwile abasambi bonse ukuti, baali na ukupanikwa 
ubushiku bwakonkelepo pamulandu na imibele yabo iya congo. 
i. Kafundisha: 
 Peela abasambi ilyashi umuli amashiwi yalanga ifyo ifintu filecitika elyo na ayalanga ifyo

Imibombele ileenekelwa: Amashiwi ayalanga ifyo icintu cilecitika elyo nayalanga ifyo icintu

Ici cipande nacikwata ifipandwa fya masambililo ifili nga: Ukumfwa na ukulanda: Muli uyu 
mulandu bali na ukusambilila pa nyimbo shapali ndakai na ubukankaala bwashiko. Ukubelenga: 
Muli uyu mulandu bali na ukusambilila ubupilibulo bwamashiwi ayaleka-lekana, Ukubelenga 
mukushika, Ukubelenga mukwikatisha, Ukuleemba: muli uyu mulandu bali na ukusambila

bali na ukusambilila pafiunda. Kabili muli uyuwine mulandu, abasambi baleenekelwa 
ukusambiolila pamashiwi ayakwata ubupilibulo ubwafisama. Ukupilibula ululimi: muli uyu 
umulandu abasambi bali na ukusambilila imisango iyalekana-lekana iyakupilibwilamo ululimi.

Ilyashi 
Pesukulu likalamba limo ifi ilyakukuka, kwaliko abakashana batatu abo abatemenwe ukwangala 
icine-cine. Aba bakashana ukuli ifyakwangala maka-maka ukulesangwa bakemba banyimbo awe 
tabalefwaya ukushala neci, nipamulandu wakuti, napesukulu line ili ifisambililo baalesambilila 
fyali fyapakwimba, kanshi na uwakubapeela umulandu tapaali nangu umo. 
Bushiku bumo, umukashana umo pali balya batatu alesefya ubushiku bwakufyalwa kwakwe, awe 
caishishe na umwana mukubeya. Ukupekanya kwapakusefya ububushiku kwatendekefye ilyo na 
ububwine bushiku tabulapalama. Kwali ukwita abantu abalekana-lekana abakwisasangwa kuli 
kulya kusefya. Ifyamabwenge fyena nisotambe, pabantu abaitilwe, epali bakemba wanyimbo 
abalekana-lekana aba abaleimba mukulekanina. Abaitilwe balikwete ifyabupe ifyo baali na 
ukupeela cikashana uwalesefya ubushiku bwakufyalwa. Awe mukwai caweme nshiwama.

81 
 
Nangula bakemba bafulile pakwamba ukusefya, kwaliko kemba umouwaishibikwe nganshi 
icaalofye conse ukubikapofye nakukana-konka. Kuti cilia ukusefya kwafika munama-nkati, awe 
naulya kemba aingile mukati ninshi nakwata nabakumushindika. Ukumona ifyo, awe bonse 
basowesha na ukusowesha ukulanga ukutemwa na ukumupokelela. Awe nao pakumona ifyo, 
tepakusongwa alati pakucinda alefwaya na ukulekelapo umweo, neco tapakokwele apo uyu kemba 
afumishishe ulwimbo lupya ulo ulwali mukanwa kamuntu onse pamulandu lwawamishe. 
Iyi, yali entendekelo yakwaluka kwamitontonkanishe yabalya bakashana na ukutampa ukumona 
ukuti, ukwimba inyimbo nga amakwebo ayengabaletela ubunonshi ukucila ukulaimbafye 
ukwabula ubukumu ubuli bonse. Icalengele bacinje imitontonkanishe yabo, nipamulandu wakufula 
kwandalama isho bakemba baaletele, calangilefye apabuta tuutu ukuti, mukwimba namomwine 
umuntu kuti asangilamo ubwikalo ubwafumaluka. 
Namukulekelesha, abakashana babili bashindike umunabo ukuyapeela amashiwi yakutasha kuli 
bonse abailesangwa kuli kulya kusefya, kabili akoseleshe nabakemba ukuti, balingile ukwikatana 
na ukulayafwana mumilimo yabo. Baibukishe bakemba balipo, pabukankala bwakuibimba muli 
ulya mulimo. Akonkenyepo na ukuti, ukupitila mukwimba kuti calenga icaalo ukulumbuka 
kufyalo fimbi, ukutwala ubunonshi bwacaalo pantanshi pamofye na ukwikatanya abantu pamo 
ukupitila mumafunde.

Ilyashi lyakulondolola umuntu nangu icintu nilimo pamisango ya milembele ya malyashi 
ayaishibikwa. Ilyashi lyakulondolola umuntu nangu icintu lyaiminina pakupeela ubulondoloshi

cilenga abalebelenga ukuumfwa kwati emobali mulyashi lilecitika.

Umulandu 
Contamplary Zambian music is modern style of music that many people in Zambia enjoy 
today. It mixes traditional Zambian sounds with new styles like hip hop, R&B and Afrobeat. 
Popular artists like Yo Maps, Macky 2 and Slapdee sing songs about love, family and life in 
Zambia. Many of them sing in local languages such as Bemba and Nyanja, which makes the 
music easy for people to understand and enjoy. Some artists also sing gospel music to share 
messages of hope and faith. With the help of phones and the internet, Zambian music can now 
be heard not just in Zambia, but around the world. 
ii. Abasambi: 
 Cilamwana aalule umulandu
